message:
fix(codex): skip max_output_tokens, use actual thinking level for reasoning effort

- Codex API rejects max_output_tokens, so skip it in codex mode
- tool_choice and parallel_tool_calls always sent in codex mode (per TS ref)
- reasoning.effort now uses the actual thinking level from options instead
  of being hardcoded to "high"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
